name: modulo
description: Premium frontend design system with 74 skills, 11 commands, and 15 agents for creating 90k-quality websites. Covers UI patterns, e-commerce, payments, CMS, maps, social features, PWA, analytics, multi-tenant, onboarding, print/PDF, design tokens, SEO/GEO, accessibility, i18n, performance, testing, virtual scroll, webhooks, database CRUD, markdown/MDX, blog, admin panels, code editors, 3D/WebGL, kanban boards, timelines, portfolios, notifications, context menus, ratings, and real-time collaboration. Includes specialized agents for performance auditing, SEO optimization, accessibility compliance, responsive testing, Figma-to-code, component docs, framework migration, design system health, security auditing, TypeScript auditing, and interaction review. Works with Next.js and Astro.
